examples: The researchers say they have also done the first nuclear genetic analysis of the American mastodon.
Scientists have now accurately carbon-dated the sharp tip that itself carved from mastodon bone.
The rib containing the spear point was part of a collection of mastodon remains unearthed in the late 1970s.
Mastodon, which came together in Atlanta during metal's commercially lean years, unapologetically embrace the genre's grandiose beginnings.
So maybe it's appropriate that the band Decibel named the very best of 2006 is called Mastodon.
